---
title: "There's a Game of Life on my home page"
description: "A glider, a click, and a small Conway simulator."
author: "Steve Haigh"
date: "2026-05-27"
categories: [meta, fun]
image: /favicon.svg
draft: true
---

There's a small green glider at the bottom of [the home page](/). Click it for [/life](/life/) — a working Conway's Game of Life simulator with controls and presets.

The favicon came first: five green squares in a 16×16 box — the smallest pattern in the game that moves. Once a glider was up in the browser tab, the page that explained it followed a day later.

Four rules, applied to every cell at once, give you oscillators, glider guns, self-replicating constructors, and a [working universal Turing machine](http://www.rendell-attic.org/gol/utm/). The further-reading list at the bottom of /life is the half-dozen sites I kept returning to.

If you find yourself there mid-meeting, try the Gosper glider gun preset.
